title: zehneria viridis
intro: Zehneria viridis, also known as wild spinach or Indian spinach, is a perennial climber with edible leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Zehneria viridis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The herbal preparations of Zehneria viridis include leaves that can be consumed raw in salads, cooked as a vegetable, or made into a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
